description_long: This house features a rectangular footprint with thick, layered stone or brick walls, displaying a pattern of alternating light and dark horizontal bands. The structure includes several arched windows and doorways, some of which are partially ruined or open to the elements, suggesting an aged or historical character. The roof is partially collapsed, revealing domed and vaulted sections, with a prominent central arch and a smaller dome visible from above. The exterior is adorned with decorative arches and pilasters, giving the building a classical or Byzantine appearance. The overall surface is rough and weathered, with visible textural variation in the masonry. The house appears to be a single-story structure with substantial wall thickness and a partially open interior.
description: A single-story stone or brick house with arched windows and doorways, featuring a partially collapsed domed roof and decorative horizontal banding. The exterior is weathered, with classical architectural details and a rough, textured surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows a prominent arched entryway flanked by decorative arches and pilasters, with the layered stonework clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the domed roof section and the irregular, partially collapsed roofline, with more arched windows visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a long wall with a series of evenly spaced arches and minimal openings, emphasizing the horizontal banding.
description_view_3: The opposite end view reveals a partially open roof, a large arched window or doorway, and the rough, unfinished edges of the structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Large central arched doorway with decorative arches and pilasters, no visible porch or steps
